title: Polydora poskeana

taxonomy: Polydora poskeana is a species of polychaete worm that belongs to the phylum Annelida. This phylum is characterized by its segmented body and is commonly known as the segmented worms. Polydora poskeana is further classified within the class Polychaeta, which includes a diverse group of marine and freshwater worms. The class Polychaeta is divided into several orders, and Polydora poskeana is placed within the order Spionida. The family Spionidae also contains other species of polychaete worms, including Polydora poskeana.
